docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BYSTROM, LOTTA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT JOHANSSON, LARS MUCH OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS BARRED BY THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS; MOREOVER THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED WAS NOT SUFFICIENT TO ESTABLISH PLAINTIFF'S EXPENDITURES AS LOANS TO DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY BYSTROM, LOTTA AS TO DEFENDANT JOHANSSON, LARS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-09-2009 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT JOHANSSON, LARS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $49.00) SERVED DEC-29-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JOHANSSON, LARS
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-23-2009 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF BYSTROM, LOTTA ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-09-2009 - CONTINUED ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING TO FEB-23-2009 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-23-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-23-2009 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
ADDED TO EXHIBIT DESTRUCTION REPORT OF JUN-02-2014
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-02-2014 ORDERED DESTROYED
